biological_replicate: Cells (HCT116; a kind gift of Martin Eilers) were cultured...
experimental_design: collisions of RNA Polymerase II (RNAPII) with DNA replication machinery (transcription-replication conflicts, TRCs)
factor_value: Mutation of HUWE1 induces TRCs, promotes WRNIP1 dissociation from RNAPII and binding to the replisome, stimulating ATM recruitment and activation at RNAPII.
